overview.zh: 圆锥破碎机是中细碎作业的高效破碎设备，处理能力40-500t/h，最大进料粒度35-350mm。采用层压破碎原理和偏心轴传动技术，破碎比大，产品粒度均匀，适用于处理坚硬矿石。广泛应用于矿山、冶金、建材等行业的中硬及以上物料的二级或三级破碎。
overview.en: Cone Crusher is a high-efficiency equipment for medium and fine crushing with 40-500t/h capacity and 35-350mm maximum feed size. Utilizing lamination crushing principle and eccentric shaft transmission technology, it delivers high crushing ratio and uniform particle size for hard ores. Widely applied in mining, metallurgy and construction industries for secondary or tertiary crushing of medium-hard and harder materials.

note.zh: 可按照客户需求进行定制
note.en: Can be customized according to customer requirements

zh: 层压破碎原理：实现高破碎比和粒形优化，产品粒度均匀，成品率高
液压调整系统：快速调节排料口尺寸，适应不同生产需求，操作便捷
偏心套技术：结合曲线腔型设计，提供更大破碎力，处理能力强
高强度轴承设计：承载能力强，运行平稳，使用寿命长
自动润滑与过载保护：确保设备安全运行，减少维护成本和停机时间
锰钢耐磨材质：关键部件采用高锰钢，抗冲击性强，延长使用周期
en: Lamination Crushing Principle: Achieves high crushing ratio and optimized particle shape with uniform output and high finished product rate
Hydraulic Adjustment System: Quickly adjusts discharge opening size to adapt to different production requirements with user-friendly operation
Eccentric Sleeve Technology: Combined with curved cavity design, provides greater crushing force and stronger processing capability
High-Strength Bearing Design: Strong load-bearing capacity, stable operation, and long service life
Automatic Lubrication and Overload Protection: Ensures safe equipment operation, reduces maintenance costs and downtime
Manganese Steel Wear-Resistant Material: Key components made of high manganese steel with strong impact resistance, extending service life

zh: 矿山行业：铁矿、铜矿、金矿等金属矿石的中细碎处理
建材领域：高品质骨料生产，满足混凝土和沥青混合料的严格标准
冶金工业：各类金属矿石的破碎处理，改善后续选矿和冶炼效果
水电工程：水利设施建设中的骨料生产和加工
化工行业：硬质原料的精细破碎和粒度控制
en: Mining Industry: Medium and fine crushing of metal ores including iron, copper and gold
Construction Materials: Production of high-quality aggregates meeting strict standards for concrete and asphalt mixtures
Metallurgical Industry: Crushing processing of various metal ores, improving subsequent beneficiation and smelting effects
Hydropower Engineering: Aggregate production and processing for hydraulic facility construction
Chemical Industry: Fine crushing and particle size control of hard raw materials
